text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: What's going on, Tarumae? Anything wrong?

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text: Oh... Um, well... First, happy birthday, Rickey.

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text:
Y-you see... I wanna make dinner for you
tonight... It's hokki meshi.

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text:
You told me once you wanted to try it! So I went
and ordered some good surf clams from my
hometown.

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text:
To be honest, I'm not sure I'll do it justice... or if
homemade cooking would even count as a
present!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: No way! I'm sure it'll be really good!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Hokki meshi, straight from the tourism
ambassador of Tomakomai? And you must know
the best recipe there is since you're great at
cooking!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Ahhh, just thinking about it's making me hungry!
Hehe, I can't wait to try it! ♪
